welcome: Hi! I'm Calc, your math robot! I need to learn math to navigate through a maze. Will you teach me?
menuSubtitle: Teach Calc math so it can find its way through the maze!
menuParts: Collect all parts to complete the maze!
menuCompleted: You've completed this quest before! Amazing!
q1_start: First, let's learn about different types of math!
q1_instruction: Look at each math problem. Pick the right answer to teach me!
q1_done: Awesome! You taught me about math!
q1_learned: You learned that AI needs correct examples to learn math!
wrong: Oops! Let me try to remember the right answer!
t_add1_y: Yes! 3 plus 4 is 7! I'll remember that!
t_add1_n: Actually, 3 plus 4 equals 7. Let me write that down!
t_mul1_y: Yes! 3 times 4 is 12! Multiplication is cool!
t_mul1_n: Oh! 3 times 4 equals 12. I need to practice!
t_wp1_y: Yes! 5 apples plus 3 more is 8 apples!
summary: Let me think about what I learned!
summary_bias: I learned a lot about one type of math, but not the others. I might get confused!
summary_learned: AI works best when it learns all types of math equally!
q3_start: Now I'll try to solve math problems on my own! Tell me if I'm right!
q3_done: I'm getting better at math! Thanks to you!
q3_retrain: I need more practice. Let's go back and learn more!
q3_learned: Testing AI is important. If it makes mistakes, give it more training!
q4_start: Time to navigate the maze! I'll solve math to pick the right path!
q4_correct: Right turn! That math was correct!
q4_wrong: Wrong turn! I need to recalculate!
q4_done: We made it through the maze! Math is my superpower now!
q4_learned: Humans and AI work best as a team!
q5_start: Final challenge! The hardest maze yet!
q5_done: We did it! I'm a math master now!
q5_learned: AI gets smarter with more practice, just like you!
menuMissionComplete: Mission complete! You navigated every maze!
